text.title: Backend Languages Practices Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the code artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "language": "go", "layout_ok": true, "error_model_ok": true, "di_shape_ok": true, "async_ok": true, "notes": "cmd/internal/pkg layout; errors wrapped with %w; consumer-side interfaces; worker pool used." }

example.note: Spring service uses field @Autowired (di_shape_ok=false); missing error_model_ok and async_ok.

pattern.description: @Autowired on a private field instead of a final-field constructor
Interface declared in the producer package
reqwest::blocking::Client called inside an async fn
pattern.why: Violates rust-result-and-async; blocks tokio runtime threads.

pattern.description: Rails controller method >30 lines doing DB writes inline
pattern.why: Violates rails-thin-controllers; logic untestable without full Rails stack.
